title: Personal Pipeline profile (pipeline.user.yaml, AP2 P3a)
description: Structure-only validation for pipeline.user.yaml -- the ONE source-of-intent config personalizing a cloned Agent-Pipeline copy (PRD AP2 §5/§5a). Consumed by setup.mjs with the SAME hand-rolled validator used for critic-verdict.schema.json / pipeline-manifest.schema.json (plugins/pipeline-core/lib/schema-lite.mjs) -- understands exactly: type, required, properties, items, enum, additionalProperties. setup.mjs itself still owns the compile step (user.yaml -> .claude/settings.json + pipeline.json + pipeline.yaml); this schema only guards user.yaml's own shape.

setup.description: Public setup intent only. Personal coordinates and credentials stay out of this schema and all generated Public-Core projections.

worktypes.description: THE place to route models per work method (= the three session profiles: design-first/advisor/speed). design/feature/mini each validated against the same shape (design_phase + execution_phase, each {model, effort} strings, plus advisor: a string -- "off" or a model name) -- inlined 3x below (design_phase/execution_phase inlined 2x within each) rather than via $ref/$defs, same schema-lite constraint as models below (no $ref support).

models.description: Dispatch tiers ONLY (MP-27 3-tier: mechanic/implement/deep, plus critic's review) -- the orchestrator's own routing per work method lives in worktypes above, not here. implement/mechanic/deep/review each validated against the same shape ({model, effort} strings) -- inlined 4x below rather than via $ref/$defs, because schema-lite.mjs (plugins/pipeline-core/lib/schema-lite.mjs) understands only type/required/properties/items/enum/additionalProperties and does NOT resolve $ref -- see that file's header.

release.description: OPTIONAL SDLC Release/Promotion phase config (ADR-0033/0034), mirrored structure-only from plugins/pipeline-core/scripts/pipeline-manifest.schema.json's `release` property block (same schema-lite validator, plugins/pipeline-core/lib/schema-lite.mjs). Absent = zero behavior change (anti-bloat) -- deliberately NOT in this file's root `required` list.

environments.description: Keys are arbitrary environment names (test, prod, ...); every value validated against the environment shape below.

adapter.description: Must reference a declared release.adapters key (semantic integrity check, manifest.mjs checkReleaseIntegrity).

rollback.description: Procedure ref, or the literal "none-irreversible" -- mandatory per environment.

promotion.description: OPTIONAL; presence = this env carries the promote human-gate.

adapters.description: Keys are arbitrary adapter names (vercel-preview, vercel-prod, ...); every value validated against the adapter shape below.
